  this project has asked CMake to find a package configuration file provided
  by "surface_vehicle_model", but CMake did not find one.

  Could not find a package configuration file provided by
  "surface_vehicle_model" with any of the following names:

    surface_vehicle_modelConfig.cmake
    surface_vehicle_model-config.cmake

  Add the installation prefix of "surface_vehicle_model" to CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH
  or set "surface_vehicle_model_DIR" to a directory containing one of the
  above files.  If "surface_vehicle_model" provides a separate development
  package or SDK, be sure it has been installed.
